title: rosa viscaria var. pommaretii
intro: Rosa viscaria var. pommaretii, also known as Pommaret's alpenrose, is a plant species within the rose family (Rosaceae), native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its rich content of salicylic acid, which is similar to aspirin and has anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving effects. The health benefits of Rosa viscaria var. pommaretii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and soothe digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
